title: Death Star prototype
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Death Star}} {{Citation}} {{SpaceStation |is_mobile=1 |image=[[File:DS_prototype.jpg]] |name=Death Star prototype |designer= |manufacturer=[[Imperial Department of Military Research/Legends|Imperial Department of Military Research]]''[[Death Star Owner's Technical Manual]]'' |line= |model=Death Star prototype battlestation''[[Jedi Search]]'' |type=[[Battle station/Legends|Battlestation]] |cost=Unknown |modifier= |sysmods= |length=120 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]]''[[The Jedi Academy Sourcebook]]'' |width=120 kilometers |height=120 kilometers |diameter= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine=[[Ion engine/Legends|Ion engines]] {{C|for sublight movement only}}''[[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'' |hyperdrive=None |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen=[[Borstel Galactic Defense/Legends|Borstel Galactic Defense]] [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|field generators]] |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament=[[Concave Dish Composite Beam Superlaser]] (1)''[[Champions of the Force]]'' |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew=*Crew: 256 *[[Gunner/Legends|Gunners]]: 45 |skeleton=75 |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables=2 [[Standard month/Legends|months]] |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |region= |sector= |system= |coordinates= |xyz= |orbited= |distance= |routes= |role=*Testbed *[[Battleship/Legends|Battleship]] {{C|dreadnought}} |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |constructed=[[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]] |destroyed=[[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]] |retired= |battles=*[[Battle of the Maw]] *[[Battle of Kessel (11 ABY)|Battle of Kessel]] |owners=*[[Tol Sivron]] |namedcrew= |captains= |registry= |aliases= |population= |interest= |services= |sectors= |modules= }} {{Quote|I have not had the chance to read the complete technical readouts of this battle-station prototype. Does anyone know how to fly this vessel?|Tol Sivron|}} The '''Death Star prototype''' was a test-bed for the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]]. It was constructed in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] secret [[Maw Installation]]. ==Description== {{Quote|According to my own records, Maw Installation had a fully functional prototype. If they take that Death Star into New Republic space—|Qwi Xux|}} [[File:DSprototype_egvv.jpg|thumb|left|180px|[[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] prototype [[:Category:Technical drawing images|schematics]].]] The [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] prototype was a simple [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]] frame with a [[Reactor/Legends|reactor]] core, [[Concave Dish Composite Beam Superlaser|superlaser]], [[Engine/Legends|engines]], and a control sector. First conceived by [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]], it was constructed by [[Bevel Lemelisk]] and his [[Engineer/Legends|engineers]] at the [[Maw Installation]]. The Death Star prototype measured 120 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] in diameter. Its [[Superlaser/Legends|superlaser]] was only powerful enough to destroy a [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] core, rendering it uninhabitable, although it was powerful enough to totally destroy larger [[Moon/Legends|moons]]. The superlaser also took a large amount of power and drained the vehicle's batteries. It took 15 [[Standard minute|minutes]] to recharge the batteries and superlaser. The [[Targeting computer/Legends|targeting system]] on the Death Star prototype was also never calibrated, greatly hurting its accuracy. The prototype's interior consisted of multiple levels, one of which housed a control room where all the computers including the superlaser were [[Slave circuit|slave linked]], and at least one or two other decks that were able to hold a majority of the Maw Installation's personnel. This meant the station could be run by only a small crew, although only one person was needed to pilot the structure. An intercom system was installed that could be heard throughout the entire station. Multiple catwalks and access hatches were present throughout the prototype, notably the core. The interiors of the later Death Stars were taken up by the [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] engines and other components. ==History== {{Quote|The Sun Crusher and the ''Gorgon'' are already here—now you're telling me the Death Star is coming back?|Wedge Antilles after learning of the Death Star Prototype's imminent arrival during the Battle of the Maw|}}
[[File:Death_Star_Prototype_destruction.jpg|thumb|180px|The Death Star prototype's destruction.]]
The Death Star prototype was constructed to see if the planet-destroying superlaser could be built. As soon as the laser worked, the prototype was left anchored above the Maw Installation since it had fulfilled its mission. It was never completed. [[Tol Sivron]] and his colleagues used the Death Star Prototype to flee an [[Battle of the Maw|attack]] by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] on the Maw Installation in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]]. After escaping out of [[Maw Cluster/Legends|the Maw]] and into the [[Kessel system/Legends|Kessel system]], the crew began to repair the damage they sustained. Once it was fixed, Sivron decided to test the superlaser. Using [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] as a target, the prototype fired but missed, due to the poor calibration, and hit the [[Garrison Moon|moon]] instead, completely destroying it. The station was [[Battle of Kessel (11 ABY)|driven off]] by the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] and assorted [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] forces of the [[Smugglers' Alliance]], eventually retreating back into the Maw Cluster after firing the superlaser at the oncoming ships a few times. After a quick meeting, Sivron and the other crew members decided to return to the Maw Installation and use the prototype to destroy the facility, in order to not let their research fall into enemy hands. The ''Millennium Falcon'', piloted by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]]; had flown into and attached itself to the core while the station moved. As Solo repaired the Falcon, Jade and Calrissian used [[Environment suit/Legends|enviro-suits]] to exit the ship and place [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonators]] on the core in an attempt to destroy it and cripple the prototype. The intruders were detected by the scanners in the control room and two [[Zero-G assault stormtrooper|spacetroopers]] were sent to stop them. The two troopers emerged through a trap door and began to scuffle with Jade, who managed to kill one of them but retreated with Calrissian as the timed detonators were close to exploding. The Falcon escaped as the surviving spacetrooper managed to disable all but one of the detonators, which exploded when the timer ran out, killing the trooper. Soon, the Death Star Prototype reemerged at the Maw Installation and entered the battle that was taking place between [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles']] New Republic forces and the recently arrived [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala]]'s [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial II-class Star Destroyer]], ''[[Gorgon]]''. However, Sivron only wished to destroy the Maw Installation and refused to fire on Antillies' forces and help Daala, as she and her fleet had previously abandoned the Maw to attack the New Republic, leaving the scientists unprotected. As Sivron moved to fire on the Installation, the explosion in the core crippled the station, requiring immediate repairs and temporarily preventing the superlaser from shooting, giving Wedge and his men enough time to evacuate the facility before it was destroyed by Daala's [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] after the facility's shields failed. [[Kyp Durron]], who had come to the Installation to destroy the [[Sun Crusher]] once and for all, attempted to destroy the prototype by firing [[resonance torpedo]]es at the superstructure. Despite large portions of the station sustaining damage, the prototype was still operational and began to fire its superlaser at Durron, who quickly ran out of torpedoes. Sivron himself took the controls and chased Durron around the Maw, while the superlaser fired, trying to destroy the Sun Crusher. The Death Star prototype was finally destroyed when Durron lured it into one of the Maw's [[Black hole/Legends|black holes]], but not before finally being struck by the superlaser, although taking very little damage due to the Sun Crusher's invulnerable [[Quantum-crystalline armor]]. Though it is never directly stated, there are indications that other prototypes might have existed. ==Behind the scenes== Originally, the Death Star prototype was considered to be just that—a project begun prior to work beginning on the Death Star I. However, following the appearance of the [[Death Star plans/Legends|Death Star plans]] in [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Attack of the Clones'']] and the first Death Star in [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Revenge of the Sith'']] (confirmed by [[George Lucas]] himself), ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' [[Retroactive continuity|retconned]] the prototype into being built alongside the main Death Star because concerns were raised. ''Champions of the Force'' describes the Death Star prototype to have an interior superstructure consisting of a maze of beams and catwalks, similar to the second Death Star. However, drawings of the station show it to have an entirely open interior other than the reactor core and superlaser. ==Appearances== *[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] {{Mo}} *''[[Jedi Search]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Champions of the Force]]'' ==Sources== *''[[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'' *''[[The Jedi Academy Sourcebook]]'' *{{FactFile|7|DEA 1-2|Deploying the Death Star}} {{Imo}} *{{FactFile|9|CHE 9-12|Chewbacca}} *''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *{{FactFile|74|CRE 1-4|Creation of the First Death Star}} *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *''[[Death Star Owner's Technical Manual]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Prototyp des Todessterns |es=Prototipo de la Estrella de la Muerte |uk=Прототип Зірки Смерті }} [[Category:Death Stars]] [[Category:Galactic Empire space stations]] [[Category:Imperial Department of Military Research products]]
